title: Small Chisel
description: Add a chisel with low durability but capable of quickly excavating stones to skip wooden pickaxes and a variant for excavating obsidian
body:
_This mod was made by **Mcreator** (Forge 1.20.1 and Neoforge 1.20.4)_
# This mod added a new kind of tool : Chisel
Wooden Chisel --- Can break 3 block,it can help you skip Wooden Pickaxe

Diamond Chisel --- Can break 16 block,it can help you get obsidian to build Nether Portal and make a Enchantment Table quickly.

Recipes 

X - Any logs

Y - Any planks

Z - Diamond

Wooden Chisel       Diamond Chisel

![Wooden Chisel's recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46102163463a3f8e41c70d079d18ef7e2b8be83.png)
![Diamond Chisel's recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd7884568195ec4a4454f6e3e6bc2c14ce72fd2f.png)

Future plans include refining the chisel class to excel at bulk block mining while maintaining game balance, plus expanding mod compatibility and introducing more niche yet practical use cases for greater versatility.
